sentences.arabic: ذَهَبْنَا إِلَى مَطْعَمٍ لُبْنَانِيٍّ فِي اللَّيْلَةِ الْمَاضِيَةِ.
sentences.translation: Sinoć smo otišli u jedan libanski restoran.
sentences.translationEn: We went to a Lebanese restaurant last night.

sentences.arabic: أَحْضَرَ لَنَا النَّادِلُ قَائِمَةَ الطَّعَامِ مَعَ خِيَارَاتٍ كَثِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Konobar nam je donio jelovnik sa mnogo opcija.
sentences.translationEn: The waiter brought us the menu with many options.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبْتُ الْكَبَابَ الْمَشْوِيَّ وَاخْتَارَ صَدِيقِي حِسَاءَ الْخُضْرَاوَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Naručio sam grilovani kebab, a moj prijatelj je izabrao supu od povrća.
sentences.translationEn: I ordered grilled kebab and my friend chose vegetable soup.
